problem: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different?
hypothesis: If Federated learning without data centralization is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Hardware prototype with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
